---
name: Improvement proposal
about: Propose a change to a skill's generic logic (often generated by the skill's own "propose an improvement" flow)
title: "[proposal] "
labels: proposal
---

## The gap

<!-- What did the skill do that fell short, or fail to do? -->

## The case that triggered it

<!-- Concrete inputs / situation. A reproducible example is ideal. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What should change in the generic (Tier-1) logic? A focused diff or precise description. -->

## Sourcing (if this adds factual/reference data)

<!-- Where does the data come from? Mark anything unverified. Required for safety-relevant data. -->

## Why it's generalizable

<!-- Why this helps users beyond your own instance, rather than belonging in your Tier-3 config/data. -->
